skills.name: clawql-audit-workflows
skills.description: Use the optional audit ring buffer for live operator breadcrumbs during workflows.

skills.name: clawql-cache-workflows
skills.description: Use the optional cache tool as ephemeral scratch state during active sessions.

skills.name: clawql-composed-mcp-workflows
skills.description: Apply proven end-to-end recipes combining search/execute, memory, notify, schedule, and optional tools.

skills.name: clawql-execute-workflows
skills.description: Execute discovered API operations safely with argument validation and post-change verification.

skills.name: clawql-external-ingest
skills.description: Import external markdown or URL content using ingest_external_knowledge with dry-run-first validation.

skills.name: clawql-memory-ingest
skills.description: Persist durable session outcomes with memory_ingest using stable titles, append threading, and wikilinks.

skills.name: clawql-memory-recall
skills.description: Recall relevant vault context before deep work using focused queries and graph depth controls.

skills.name: clawql-notify-workflows
skills.description: Send actionable Slack milestones and failure notifications with the optional notify tool.

skills.name: clawql-onyx-knowledge-workflows
skills.description: Use knowledge_search_onyx to ground workflows in enterprise evidence before execution.

skills.name: clawql-ouroboros-workflows
skills.description: Run iterative specification-first workflows with ouroboros_* tools, lineage checks, and clear boundaries vs raw infra (kubectl/Helm).

skills.name: clawql-sandbox-exec
skills.description: Run isolated code snippets via sandbox_exec with safe persistence/session patterns.

skills.name: clawql-schedule-workflows
skills.description: Build recurring synthetic checks with schedule, validate via dry_run, and pair with notify.

skills.name: clawql-search-workflows
skills.description: Use ClawQL search to discover correct operationIds before execute calls, especially in multi-provider workflows.

skills.name: clawql-vault-memory
skills.description: Deep ClawQL Obsidian vault workflows using memory_ingest and memory_recall MCP tools—structured insights, wikilink graphs, session threading, verbatim captures, and recall queries. Use when persisting important context, building a knowledge graph, starting tasks that may depend on prior vault notes, or when the user mentions Obsidian, the vault, memory, or long-running project context.
